creator: alucardtepesXI@yahoo.com
text:
I am trying to install freebsd6.2 beta3 on my athlon64 3800+ x2, asus
a8n32-sli delux, 1024GB of ram, sound blaster audigy, evga 7800gt 256mb
pcie, 250 western digital, 40 gig samsung (slave) computer. Did a
standard install with acpi off. The media was ftp. I did a custom for
my distribution set. I manually selected the packages i wanted. Then
during the installation of the packages, I get a kernel panic "init
failure...nothing left to do. Hit any key for console. Reboot. Rebooting".
I notice this happened during the pkg_add portsupgrade package. The
reason i am using the beta is because the older versions dont detect my
nforce and marvell nics.

Fix: 

Dont know..still a little new to the *bsds.
How-To-Repeat: Install freebsd 6.2 beta3 on a system like mine (see above) and customly
select packages for gnome, xorg, and sound utilitys, hell select all of
them, im sure it will do it.
